raw_title: (Trans)Locality in Social Media News Engagement: Geographic Effects on the Quality of Online Discussion
title_en: (Trans)Locality in Social Media News Engagement: Geographic Effects on the Quality of Online Discussion
title_zh: 社交媒体新闻参与中的（跨）地域性：地理因素对在线讨论质量的影响
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了地理因素如何影响人们在社交媒体上参与新闻讨论的质量。它关注不同地区的人们在讨论新闻时，他们的地理位置是否会改变讨论的方式和深度。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how geographic factors affect the quality of people's engagement with news discussions on social media. It focuses on whether people's locations influence how and how deeply they discuss news online.
research_direction_zh: 数字新闻学中社交媒体参与的地理维度研究，探索空间因素对在线互动和公共话语的影响。
research_direction_en: Research on the geographic dimensions of social media engagement in digital journalism, exploring how spatial factors influence online interactions and public discourse.
